instances.title: Dear future us
instances.content: **Dear future us**, what we're creating together...

instances.title: Ideas for the next sprint
instances.content:
## Ideas for the next sprint
1. Improve sync
2. Add `format: "md"` support
3. Ship it

instances.title: Markdown Formatting
instances.content:
# Markdown Formatting

## Headers
Use `#`, `##`, `###` for headings.

## Text
**Bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~, `inline code`.

## Lists
- Unordered item
- Another item

1. Ordered item
2. Second item

## Code
```javascript
const x = 42;
```

## Links
[MaiaOS](https://maia.city)

## Blockquote
> A quote for emphasis.
